2604.09450.title: ECHO: Efficient Chest X-ray Report Generation with One-step Block Diffusion
2604.09450.paper_summary: Chest X-ray report generation (CXR-RG) has the potential to substantially alleviate radiologists' workload. However, conventional autoregressive vision--language models (VLMs) suffer from high inference latency due to sequential token decoding. Diffusion-based models offer a promising alternative through parallel generation, but they still require multiple denoising iterations. Compressing multi-step denoising to a single step could further reduce latency, but often degrades textual coherence due to the mean-field bias introduced by token-factorized denoisers. To address this challenge, we propose \textbf{ECHO}, an efficient diffusion-based VLM (dVLM) for chest X-ray report generation. ECHO enables stable one-step-per-block inference via a novel Direct Conditional Distillation (DCD) framework, which mitigates the mean-field limitation by constructing unfactorized supervision from on-policy diffusion trajectories to encode joint token dependencies. In addition, we introduce a Response-Asymmetric Diffusion (RAD) training strategy that further improves training efficiency while maintaining model effectiveness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ECHO surpasses state-of-the-art autoregressive methods, improving RaTE and SemScore by \textbf{64.33\%} and \textbf{60.58\%} respectively, while achieving an \textbf{$8\times$} inference speedup without compromising clinical accuracy.
2604.09450.paper_summary_zh: 胸部X光報告生成（CXR-RG）有潛力顯著減輕放射科醫師的工作負擔。<lb/>然而，傳統的自回歸視覺-語言模型（VLMs）因為序列標記解碼而遭受高推理延遲。<lb/>基於擴散的模型透過平行生成提供了一個有希望的替代方案，但仍然需要多次去噪迭代。<lb/>將多步驟去噪壓縮為單一步驟可以進一步減少延遲，但通常會因為標記分解去噪器引入的均場偏差而降低文本一致性。<lb/>為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了\textbf{ECHO}，一種高效的基於擴散的VLM（dVLM）用於胸部X光報告生成。<lb/>ECHO通過一個新穎的直接條件蒸餾（DCD）框架實現穩定的每區塊一步推理，該框架通過從政策擴散軌跡構建未分解的監督來緩解均場限制，以編碼聯合標記依賴性。<lb/>此外，我們還引入了一種反應不對稱擴散（RAD）訓練策略，進一步提高訓練效率，同時保持模型的有效性。<lb/>大量實驗表明，ECHO超越了最先進的自回歸方法，RaTE和SemScore分別提高了\textbf{64.33\%}和\textbf{60.58\%}，同時在不妥協臨床準確性的情況下實現了\textbf{$8\times$}的推理加速。
2604.09450.author: Lifeng Chen et.al.
2604.09450.authors: Lifeng Chen, Tianqi You, Hao Liu, Zhimin Bao, Jile Jiao, Xiao Han, Zhicai Ou, Tao Sun, Xiaofeng Mou, Xiaojie Jin, Yi Xu
